files_to_create.purpose: Client-side hook that reads sessionStorage flag 'parentAuthed' === '1'. Redirects to /parent if absent.
Unit tests for the new useParentAuth hook: authed case, unauthenticated redirect case.
Unit tests for ChangePinSection: verify step, new PIN step, done state, error feedback on save failure.

changes: In handlePinSubmit: add sessionStorage.setItem('parentAuthed', '1') before router.replace when ok===true
Replace silent 'if (!pinHash) return;' with onboarding-aware redirect or user-visible error message
Import and call useParentAuth; add 'if (!isAuthed) return null' guard
Add getSetting(db, 'childName') to Promise.all data fetch
Update ParentLayout title prop to use child name with fallback to generic title (applied to loading skeleton AND main render)
Import and call useParentAuth; add 'if (!isAuthed) return null' guard
In handleNewPin catch block: call setErrorMsg('Failed to save new PIN / 保存失败') to surface the error to the user
Add test: sessionStorage 'parentAuthed' flag is set to '1' on correct PIN entry
Add test: shows error message when pinHash is empty
Mock sessionStorage in beforeEach to allow assertions
Add mock for '@/hooks/useParentAuth' returning { isAuthed: true } to prevent redirect
Add mockGetSetting to the db mock and configure it to return childName in beforeEach
Add test: shows child name in title when childName is set
Add test: shows generic title when childName is empty
Add mock for '@/hooks/useParentAuth' returning { isAuthed: true } to prevent redirect

steps: 3. Modify src/app/parent/page.tsx: set sessionStorage on success, handle empty pinHash
4. Modify src/app/parent/dashboard/page.tsx: add auth guard, add childName fetch and display
6. Modify src/components/parent/ChangePinSection.tsx: add error feedback in catch
10. Update src/__tests__/ParentDashboard.test.tsx with useParentAuth mock and childName tests
12. Run npm test and fix failures

test_cases: useParentAuth: redirects to /parent when sessionStorage flag absent
useParentAuth: sets isAuthed=true when flag present
ParentPage: sets sessionStorage parentAuthed=1 on correct PIN
ParentPage: shows error message when pinHash is empty
ParentDashboard: shows child name in title when stored
ParentDashboard: shows generic title when no child name
ChangePinSection: shows error feedback when save fails

risk_areas.area: Test compatibility — useParentAuth in dashboard/settings tests
risk_areas.mitigation: Mock '@/hooks/useParentAuth' returning { isAuthed: true } in affected test files to bypass the guard

risk_areas.area: ParentDashboard test — getSetting not in existing db mock
risk_areas.mitigation: Add getSetting to the @/lib/db mock in ParentDashboard.test.tsx and configure it to return childName
jsdom provides sessionStorage; use jest.spyOn(sessionStorage, 'setItem') or set/read directly

risk_areas.area: settings page already 159 lines, dashboard 153 lines
risk_areas.mitigation: Task rules say 'do not refactor code outside scope'; adding minimal lines is acceptable since files already exceed 150

risk_areas.area: Empty pinHash with db=null race condition
risk_areas.mitigation: Guard with 'if (db)' before DB call in empty-pinHash path, same as existing pattern

persistence_strategy: No new persistence needed. Auth flag uses sessionStorage (session-scoped, cleared on tab close). childName is read from existing IndexedDB settings store.
error_handling_approach: Every new code path has try/catch with user-visible error message. useParentAuth redirects silently (no error needed). Empty pinHash shows informative bilingual error. ChangePinSection save failure shows red error text.
